info.title: robotsix-central-deploy Lifecycle API
info.description: Start, stop, restart, and inspect suite services.

get.description:
Return current system settings. Secrets are returned as ``"***"``
when set, or ``""`` when empty.

Reads from the *effective* config (env-var values overlaid by any
stored settings) so that env-var credentials are visible in the UI
even before the operator has saved settings via the UI.

put.description:
Update system settings, persist to disk, and hot-apply where possible.

- Secret fields sent as ``"***"`` preserve the existing stored value.
- ``log_level`` is validated via Pydantic; an invalid value returns 422.
- All settings *except* ``registry_check_interval`` and
  ``claude_host_mount_path`` take effect immediately without restart.

# NOTE: ``registry_check_interval`` changes are persisted and reflected
  in ``app.state.config``, but the background ``_registry_check_loop``
  captures its interval at startup via a positional argument.  Updating
  the config alone does **not** alter the running task's sleep period.
  A full service restart is required for an interval change to take
  effect on the background loop.

# NOTE: ``claude_host_mount_path`` is captured by ``DockerSdkBackend``
  at construction time.  Updating the config alone does **not** alter
  the running backend's mount path.  A full service restart is required
  for a change to take effect.

get.description: Host disk usage and Docker storage breakdown.

post.description: Prune Docker build cache and return bytes freed.

get.description: Current volume audit state (sizes and growth). Returns enabled=false when subsystem is off.

get.summary: List Docker volumes owned by no component and not in use
get.description:
Return the prune-safe orphan volumes and their total size.

Orphans are Docker volumes declared by no registered component and not
attached to any container — leftovers from removed/re-onboarded components.

post.summary: Remove orphan Docker volumes (owned by no component, not in use)
post.description:
Delete orphan volumes (IRREVERSIBLE).

The eligible set is recomputed server-side on every call — a component's
own volumes and in-use volumes are never touched even if their names are
passed in ``names``.  With no ``names`` (or ``names=null``) every orphan is
pruned; with an explicit list, only names that are still genuine orphans
are removed and the rest are reported under ``skipped``.

get.summary: List files in a data volume
get.description:
Return immediate children of a directory within a named volume.

Only volumes declared in at least one component's ``named_volumes`` are
browsable.  ``path`` defaults to the volume root.

get.summary: Read a text file from a data volume
get.description:
Return the text content of a file within a named volume.

Files larger than ``VOLUME_CAT_MAX_BYTES`` are truncated (``truncated=True``).
Binary files (NUL byte or non-UTF-8) return ``binary=True`` and ``content=null``.

delete.summary: Remove an onboarded component and optionally its container

parameters.name: stop_container

schema.description: Stop and remove the managed container (true) or leave it running (false)
schema.title: Stop Container

parameters.description: Stop and remove the managed container (true) or leave it running (false)

parameters.name: remove_volumes

schema.description: Also delete the component's data volumes (IRREVERSIBLE — destroys stored data)
schema.title: Remove Volumes

parameters.description: Also delete the component's data volumes (IRREVERSIBLE — destroys stored data)

parameters.name: follow

schema.description: If true, stream new log lines as they arrive
schema.title: Follow

parameters.description: If true, stream new log lines as they arrive

post.summary: Deploy a new image version for a service

404.description: Service or component config not found

post.summary: Rollback a service to its prior image digest

get.summary: Get stored environment variables and secret keys for a service

put.summary: Upsert environment variables and secrets for a service

delete.summary: Delete an environment variable or secret key for a service

get.summary: Get config.yaml schema and current values for a service

put.summary: Merge and save config.yaml values for a service

post.summary: Run a repo-declared config-assist command in a one-shot container and return auto-filled config

400.description: No config-assist command or config volume configured

post.description:
Fetch and parse a service repo's docker-compose.yml, returning a DerivedSpec.

The caller reviews the spec before confirming onboarding via `/onboard/confirm`.
Persist a reviewed DerivedSpec, deploy the container, and register the component.
